scripts.quick-release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add [package.json](http://_vscodecontentref_/4) && git commit -m "chore: bump patch version"
scripts.quick-release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && git add [package.json](http://_vscodecontentref_/5) && git commit -m "chore: bump minor version"
scripts.quick-release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && git add [package.json](http://_vscodecontentref_/6) && git commit -m "chore: bump major version"
